name: Eric Boyer
title: Owner
text: I offered to write this letter because I meant it when I told his team: if any of you need anything, I'm here. Carsen earned that without question. I would confidently recommend him to any engineering team looking for a developer who is both technically capable and a pleasure to work with.

name: Monica
title: Founder & CEO
text: I'm so excited about the game we have developed! I had a very specific vision with our card games to create something magical, creative, and seamless and not only has Carsen completed it but also continued to share customer support if I had any. I interviewed a lot of other potential candidates for this project and I am so glad that we found him to work on this. His honesty and care really stood out and the result is showing. Can't wait to get this launching soon. Thank you! Highly recommend working with Carsen!
